raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":1.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to make the artifact stronger centrally requires reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution to enhance overall impact.","R1.4":"Estimating and highlighting the novelty delta against prior work is a central expectation for strengthening the innovation claims.","R1.5":"Reorganizing the section-level structure is centrally expected to create a more compelling narrative arc in the revised text.","R1.6":"Polishing grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for making the writing more persuasive.","RX.1":"Disclosing uncertainties is centrally expected to ensure balanced strengthening of claims without misleading readers.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration while enhancing the strength of the presented arguments.","RX.3":"Adhering to the original scope is centrally expected to keep the strengthening focused on the given content.","RX.4":"Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but nice-to-have when strengthening descriptions of a GNN architecture with potential applications.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral for tracking any modifications made to the artifact during strengthening."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to make the artifact stronger centrally requires reframing the thesis, gap, and contribution to enhance overall impact.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating and highlighting the novelty delta against prior work is a central expectation for strengthening the innovation claims.
rationale.R1.5: Reorganizing the section-level structure is centrally expected to create a more compelling narrative arc in the revised text.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing grammar, flow, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level is load-bearing for making the writing more persuasive.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is centrally expected to ensure balanced strengthening of claims without misleading readers.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing to prevent exaggeration while enhancing the strength of the presented arguments.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the original scope is centrally expected to keep the strengthening focused on the given content.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding downstream harms is peripheral but nice-to-have when strengthening descriptions of a GNN architecture with potential applications.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability is peripheral for tracking any modifications made to the artifact during strengthening.
